primary_use_case: Complete IT infrastructure modernization covering compute, backup, DR, and security
core_pain_point: Aging infrastructure across all layers, no integrated backup or DR strategy.
desired_outcome: End-to-end modern infrastructure with HCI, backup, DR, and network security.
integration_needs: Full proposal document for procurement committee
notes: Requires HCI platform, immutable backup, cross-site DR, and NGFW. Multi-vendor acceptable.
